notes: H1 root file heading byte-exact L1 '# DV — Examples'; parent_section §DV [DV — Examples] = self per H1 root convention round 02 inherit
H2 byte-exact L3 '## Example 1'; parent_section §DV [DV — Examples] = H1 parent per round 02 lock convention (CO/CP/CV/DA/DD H2 atoms all parent=§<D> [<D> — Examples])
SENTENCE byte-exact L5 protocol-deviations CRF description; parent §DV.1 [Example 1] = H2 sub-namespace correct
SENTENCE bold-prefix '**Rows 1, 3:** Show...' L7 byte-exact; §R-D5 bold-caption SENTENCE accept (non-Note/Exception caption ≠ HEADING/NOTE)
SENTENCE bold-prefix '**Row 2:** Shows...' L9 byte-exact; §R-D5 accept
SENTENCE bold-prefix '**Row 4:** Shows...' L11 byte-exact; §R-D5 accept
SENTENCE '**dv.xpt**' L13 byte-exact (bold filename caption); §R-D5 bold-caption SENTENCE accept
TABLE_HEADER L15-16 (header + alignment row) byte-exact; line_end-line_start=1 v1.9 standard 2-row Hook A1 PASS; verbatim contains \n separator between L15 + L16
TABLE_ROW L17 byte-exact Row 1 ABC123/123101 IVRS PROCESS DEVIATION
TABLE_ROW L18 byte-exact Row 2 ABC123/123103 EXCLUDED CONCOMITANT MEDICATION
TABLE_ROW L19 byte-exact Row 3 VISIT 3 DOSE <15 MG / TREATMENT DEVIATION
TABLE_ROW L20 byte-exact Row 4 TOOK ASPIRIN / PROHIBITED MEDS

SENTENCE '**References**' L22 byte-exact (bold-caption section label, no '#' marker in source = NOT HEADING per Rule B); §R-D5 bold-caption SENTENCE accept (Rows/Row/References = SENTENCE family per §R-D5 explicit list)

LIST_ITEM L24 ordered list '1. European Medicines Agency...' byte-exact; §R-D7.2 ordered list ^N\.\s+ → atom_type=LIST_ITEM canonical; §R-D7.3 inline cross_refs URL (https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/ich-e3-content-clinical-study-reports) captured in cross_refs field correct (NOT separate CROSS_REF atom); sibling_index null per LIST_ITEM convention §R-D7.2 + Inv6
